name: csv-card-view
description: XLSX/CSV Card View plugin for Obsidian

scripts.deploy: cp main.js styles.css manifest.json world-map.svg csv-card-view/
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy
scripts.test:all: node test-csv-parser.mjs && node test-plugin-logic.mjs && node test-mobile-dashboards.mjs && node test-view-smoke.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:all && npm run build:deploy
